name: vercel/ai
why_relevant: Provider-agnostic TypeScript toolkit for AI-powered applications and agents.
Directly relevant to Skills guidance for agent application construction, provider abstraction, streaming, tools, UI, and sandbox boundaries.
Includes coding-agent skill surface that can be reviewed for original package-facing guidance without copying third-party content.
runtime_security_surface: local shell and sandbox integration examples
framework-specific UI hooks and application patterns
redistribution_boundary: Do not copy README examples, code snippets, prompts, or implementation content. Future normalization may write original guidance about provider abstraction, sandboxed tool loops, and package-safe coding-agent use with attribution.
next_allowed_action: Create a bounded original normalization ticket for AI SDK provider/tool/sandbox guidance.
